name: novyx-mcp
description: Persistent memory for AI agents with rollback, audit trails, and semantic search.
long_description:
Give Claude persistent memory that survives across conversations. Store memories with semantic search, roll back mistakes with time-travel, and audit every operation with cryptographic proof.

Works instantly with zero config — local SQLite mode requires no API key. Upgrade to cloud for cross-device sync, team sharing, and advanced features.

23 tools, 6 resources, 3 prompts.

api_key.title: Novyx API Key
api_key.description: Optional — leave blank for local-only mode (SQLite, no cloud). Get a free key at novyxlabs.com for cloud sync, team sharing, and advanced features.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a memory with tags, importance, and optional TTL

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a specific memory by ID

tools.name: memories
tools.description: List all memories with optional tag filtering

tools.name: memory
tools.description: Get a single memory by ID

tools.name: audit
tools.description: View the full audit trail of memory operations

tools.name: link
tools.description: Create a relationship between two memories

tools.name: triple
tools.description: Add a subject-predicate-object triple to the knowledge graph

tools.name: get_space
tools.description: Get details of a context space

tools.name: usage
tools.description: Check current tier, limits, and usage

tools.name: replay_timeline
tools.description: View full timeline of memory changes (cloud)

tools.name: replay_lifecycle
tools.description: Full lifecycle of a single memory (cloud)
